description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:3 Docker image with two stages: test and deploy. In the test stage add a test job that runs `pip install pytest`, `pip3 install .`, and `python3 -m pytest tests/main.py`. In the deploy stage add a deploy job that only runs on the release branch, writes a `.pypirc` file containing the PyPI repository URL, username sj1k and password from the $PIP_PASSWORD secret, then executes `python3 setup.py sdist upload -r pypi` to publish the package to PyPI.
